narrative: The dollar retreats as equities rally and crude oil falls, while the Federal Reserve unveils its Warsh task forces to lead a broad policy review. USD/JPY consolidates at 162.35, where the +275bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage continues to anchor the pair despite a moderate put skew in the 25d RR (Saxo, 1M, indicative mid) at -1.28. Cross-asset flows show gold higher +1.23%; equities +0.81%; DXY -0.06%; VIX 15.8. Watch the ECB policy decision on July 23 as the next major G10 catalyst.
